summary: Horizontal video, a Fox & Friends Weekend broadcast clip with a LIVE banner and network chyrons, featuring anchors plus a remote interview with DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin about a hit-and-run by an illegal immigrant that killed USC student Nate Baker. The audio is a continuous interview in which the speaker speaks against open-border policies, with a photo of the victim shown. There is no music track or editing.
notable_text: Chyrons: 'SC AG TO PROSECUTE ILLEGAL MIGRANT ACCUSED IN DEADLY HIT-AND-RUN', 'UNIV OF SC STUDENT KILLED IN HIT-AND-RUN INVOLVING ILLEGAL MIGRANT SUSPECT', 'TRICIA McLAUGHLIN | DHS ASSISTANT SECRETARY', source tag 'X/@TriciaOhio', 'FOX & FRIENDS WEEKEND'.
